steps.instruction: Confirm your Player identity, country assignment, address status, and official local currency.
Review housing, ordinary expenses, and the protected emergency-buffer target before spending.
Identify which banking, Store, and market functions are currently available rather than assuming every feature is active.
Review and accept the official stabilization Contract only after checking its objective, deadline, and reward policy.
Save the named recovery route and use it before taking high-cost debt or unverified employment.
